src: "Though we are sad for his loss, he left a legacy that will inflame the enemy nation and religion."
ref: "Meskipun kami sedih atas kehilangannya, ia telah meninggalkan warisan yang akan mengobarkan perlawanan terhadap musuh negara dan agama."

src: It is speculated that he was hit by a United States missile, which is now identified as being fired from a Predator drone, in the North Waziristan of Pakistan, and a dozen more militants were also reported dead.
ref: Menurut spekulasi dia telah diserang dengan peluru kendali Amerika Serikat, yang saat ini teridentifikasi ditembakkan dari pesawat pembunuh tanpa berawak di Waziristan Utara, Pakistan, dan selusin lebih militan juga dilaporkan terbunuh.

src: "The missile appeared to have been fired by a drone," said a Pakistani intelligence official.
ref: "Peluru kendali nampaknya ditembakkan oleh pesawat tanpa awak", kata pejabat intelijen Pakistan.

src: "They do have an ability to regenerate and replace these guys," said a Western intelligence official.
ref: "Mereka benar-benar memiliki kemampuan untuk meregenerasi dan mengganti orang-orang ini" kata pejabat intelijen Barat.

src: Al-Libi is said to have been the third highest ranking member of al-Qaeda.
ref: Al-Libi dikatakan sebagai anggota ranking ketiga tertinggi di Al-Qaida.

src: The Government of Pakistan said they did not know about his death.
ref: Pemerintah Pakistan berkata mereka tidak tahu tentang kematiannya.

src: The details of the death have not yet been fully released.
ref: Rincian kematian belum dirilis secara penuh.

src: Both teams entered Sunday's match with a seven-game unbeaten streak to give them the chance to take the final playoff spot.
ref: Kedua tim memasuki pertandingan Minggu dengan 7 permainan beruntun tak terkalahkan untuk memberi mereka kesempatan mengambil tempat pertandingan final.

src: In the end, Chicago Fire beat Los Angeles Galaxy to take the last playoff spot.
ref: Akhirnya, Chicago Fire mengalahkan Los Angeles Galaxy mengambil tempat pertandingan terakhir.

src: Chicago Fire controlled the game as they outshot Los Angeles Galaxy 22-5.
ref: Chicago Fire mengontrol permainan saat mereka menembak keluar Los Angeles Galaxy 22-5.

src: Los Angeles Galaxy recorded just a single shot on goal which came early in the 1st half.
ref: Los Angeles Galaxy tercatat hanya sekali menembak gol yang datang awal di babak pertama.

src: Chicago Fire poured the shots until they scored the winner in the 93rd minute to score the eventual game winner.
ref: Chicago Fire mengalirkan tembakan sampai mereka mendapat skor pemenang di menit ke 93 untuk mendapat skor pemenang permainan terakhir.

src: The loss for Los Angeles Galaxy eliminates them from the playoffs as Chicago Fire will play DC United in the 1st round of the playoffs.
ref: Kekalahan Los Angeles Galaxy mengeliminasi mereka dari permainan saat Chicago Fire akan bermain melawan DC United di putaran pertama pertandingan.

src: Although the United States experienced average temperatures for the December, 2006 to February, 2007 period, overall world temperatures were the warmest on record, according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA).
ref: Meskipun Amerika berpengalaman memperkirakan suhu periode bulan Desember 2006 sampai bulan Februari 2007, suhu dunia secara keseluruhan paling hangat pada rekaman data menurut Badan Kelautan Nasional dan Administrasi Atmosfir (NOAA).

src: In a March 15, 2007 report, the NOAA indicated that a record warm January helped push the combined global land and ocean surface temperature for the past winter to its highest value since records began in 1880.
ref: Pada laporan tanggal 15 Maret 2007 NOAA menunjukkan bahwa rekaman hangat Januari membantu menekan gabungan tanah global dan permukaan laut untuk musim dingin yang lalu menuju nilai tertinggi sejak rekaman yang dimulai tahun 1880.

src: The ocean-atmosphere system, El Niño, played a part in the season's record warmth, according to the report's authors, but its effects did not last long, as ocean temperatures in the central equatorial Pacific cooled more than 0.3 degrees C in February and were near average for the month.
ref: Sistem kelautan-atmosfir, El Nino memainkan bagian dalam hangatnya rekaman musim menurut laporan penulis tapi pengaruhnya tidak lama seperti suhu laut di tengah Pasifik ekuatorial menjadi dingin lebih dari 0,3 derajat C di bulan Februari dan mendekati rata-rata untuk bulan tersebut.

src: The global land-surface temperature was the warmest on record, while the ocean-surface temperature tied for second warmest in the past 128 year period, approximately 0.06 degrees C cooler than the record established during the strong El Niño episode of 1997-1998.
ref: Suhu permukaan tanah global paling hangat dalam rekaman ketika suhu permukaan laut tertahan pada suhu terhangat kedua selama periode 128 tahun ini, diperkirakan 0,06 derajat C lebih dingin daripada rekaman yang ditetapkan selama periode kuatnya El Nino tahun 1997-1998.

src: During the past century, global surface temperatures have increased approximately 0.06 degrees C per decade, but since 1976 the rate of increase has been about 0.18 degrees C per decade.
ref: Selama seabad terakhir, suhu permukaan global telah bertambah kira-kira 0,06 derajat C per dekade, tapi sejak tahun 1976 jumlah pertambahannya 0,18 derajat C per dekade.

src: The greatest temperature increase occurred in the high latitudes of the Northern Hemisphere.
ref: Pertambahan suhu terbesar terjadi di lintang tinggi belahan bumi utara.

src: In an interview with Reuters, Jay Lawrimore of NOAA suggested that the data does not show greenhouse gases had an influence on the recent temperature increases, but acknowledges that by "looking at long-term trends and long-term changes, we are able to better understand natural and anthropogenic (human-caused) climate change."
ref: Dalam sebuah wawancara Reuters, Jay Lawrimore dari NOAA menyarankan bahwa data tidak menunjukkan gas rumah kaca mempengaruhi pertambahan suhu terakhir, tetapi mengakui bahwa dengan "melihat tren jangka panjang dan perubahan jangka panjang, kita dapat memahami lebih baik alam dan perubahan iklim antropogenik (disebabkan manusia)."

src: A U.S. Commerce Department agency based in Washington, D.C., the NOAA conducts research and gathers data on oceans and atmosphere.
ref: Departemen perdagangan Amerika yang berpusat di Washington DC, NOAA melakukan riset dan mengumpulkan data tentang lautan dan atmosfir.

src: The NOAA is a participant in the Group on Earth Observations, GEO, an intergovernmental effort to coordinate the collection of Earth observations worldwide.
ref: NOAA adalah peserta dalam Kelompok Observasi Bumi, GEO, usaha antarpemerintah untuk mengatur pengumpulan observasi bumi seluruh dunia.

src: Clare Short, the United Kingdom's then-Secretary of State for International Development, appeared before the Iraq Inquiry yesterday, and told the panel that the Cabinet was "misled" about the Iraq War's legality prior to the 2003 invasion.
ref: Clare Short, mantan Menteri Luar Negeri urusan Pembangunan Internasional Inggris, muncul sebelum pengiriman ke Irak kemarin, dan memberitahu panel bahwa Kabinet telah "keliru" tentang legalitas Perang Irak sebelum invasi tahun 2003.

src: The three-hour session was held in the Queen Elizabeth II Conference Centre in London's City of Westminster.
ref: Sesi sepanjang 3 jam tersebut diadakan di Pusat Konferensi Queen Elizabeth II di Westminster, London.

src: Short, an outspoken critic of the war, retired from the cabinet to become an independent MP two months before the invasion.
ref: Short, seorang kritikus perang yang blak-blakan, pensiun dari kabinet dan menjadi seorang anggota parlemen independen dua bulan sebelum invasi.

src: She claimed to have been "conned" into staying on despite her doubts about the war and told the inquiry that the Cabinet, of which she was a part, was not a "decision-making body", and that Parliament was simply a "rubber stamp".
ref: Dia mengaku telah "ditipu" untuk tetap bertahan terlepas dari keraguannya tentang perang dan menyatakan penyelidikan bahwa Kabinet, tempat dia pernah menjadi bagiannya, bukanlah "badan pembuat keputusan", dan bahwa Parlemen hanyalah sebuah "stempel karet."

src: In what is becoming an annual phenomenon in France, 400 cars were set ablaze during the New Year's night.
ref: Dalam kejadian yang menjadi suatu fenomena tahunan di Perancis, 400 mobil dibakar pada malam Tahun Baru.

src: In 2006, an average of 112 cars a day were torched across France.
ref: Di tahun 2006, rata-rata 112 mobil per hari dibakar di seluruh Perancis.

src: There were 15 attacks per day on police and emergency services.
ref: Ada 15 serangan per hari terhadap polisi dan layanan-layanan darurat.

src: Almost 3,000 police officers were injured in clashes with residents.
ref: Hampir 3.000 petugas polisi terluka dalam bentrokan dengan warga.

src: In four separate ambushes, officers were badly injured in the Paris suburbs since September.
ref: Dalam 4 penyergapan terpisah, para petugas polisi terluka parah di pinggiran Paris sejak September.

src: Police speak of open war with youths who are bent on more than vandalism.
ref: Polisi menyatakan perang terbuka dengan para pemuda yang bertekad untuk lebih dari vandalisme.

src: Police in Melbourne, Australia are on the hunt for a gunman who killed a man and injured two others in the city's central business district this morning.
ref: Polisi di Melbourne, Australia sedang mengejar perampok bersenjata api yang membunuh seorang pria dan melukai 2 orang lainnya di distrik pusat bisnis pagi ini.

src: Officials warned all office workers to remain indoors, and train services to Flinders Street Station were temporarily on hold, as investigations were carried out on the intersection of Flinders Lane and William Street.
ref: Pemerintah memperingatkan semua pekerja kantor untuk tetap berada di dalam ruangan, dan pelayanan kereta ke stasiun Jalan Flinder ditunda sementara, karena investigasi dilanjutkan sampai ke persimpangan dari Jalan Flinder dan Jalan William.

src: Malcom Bates, who witnessed the shootings at around 8:15 a.m., said the gunman grabbed a woman from inside a taxi.
ref: Malcom Bates, yang menyaksikan penembakan sekitar pukul 8.15 pagi mengungkapkan bahwa penembak menarik seorang wanita dari dalam taksi.

src: "The lady got away and he turned and shot three people basically point blank," Mr Bates said.
ref: "Wanita tersebut berhasil kabur dan dia berbalik dan menembak 3 orang dalam jarak dekat, " ungkap Bapak Bates.

src: He said that the incident took no longer than the "wink of an eye".
ref: Ia mengungkapkan bahwa insiden itu terjadi dalam "sekejap mata."

src: Paramedics struggled to revive the one victim for almost an hour before declaring him dead at the scene.
ref: Pihak medis kesulitan menghidupkan kembali salah satu korban selama hampir satu jam sebelum mengumumkan kematiannya di tempat perkara.

src: The two injured people have been taken to the Royal Melbourne Hospital in a critical condition.
ref: 2 orang yang terluka telah dibawa ke rumah sakit Royal Melbourne dalam keadaan kritis.

src: Police believe the incident began at the Bar Code 24-hour bar in King Street, when a woman attempted to get into a taxi.
ref: Polisi yakin bahwa insiden dimulai dari Bar Code 24 jam di jalan King, saat seorang wanita berusaha mencari taksi.

src: She was apparently grabbed by the hair by the gunman who then shot her and two men who attempted to come to her aid.
ref: Dia dijambak oleh perampok bersenjata yang kemudian menembaknya dan 2 orang lainnya yang hendak menolong.

src: Police have identified the gunman as Christopher Wayne Hudson, aged 29.
ref: Polisis telah mengidentifikasi penembak sebagai Christopher Wayne Hudson, berusia 29 tahun.

src: They believe him to be a member of the Hells Angels bikie gang.
ref: Mereka percaya dia merupakan salah satu anggota gang motor Hells Angeles.

src: Police have described Hudson as about 180 cm tall, with short brown hair and wearing a dark tracksuit top and dark denim jeans.
ref: Polisi mendeskripsikan Hudson tinggi sekitar 180 cm, dengan rambut coklat pendek dan mengenakan atasan baju balap gelap dan celana jins gelap.

src: A building worker on a construction site on the corner of Queen and Flinders Streets has reportedly discovered a handgun.
ref: Seorang pekerja bangunan di daerah konstruksi di ujung Queen dan Jalan Flinder telah menemukan sebuah pistol.

src: It is understood the gunman may have thrown the weapon into the site as he fled the scene.
ref: Dipahami bahwa penembak itu telah melemparkan senjatanya kedalam daerah itu saat dia melarikan diri dari tempat kejadian.

src: Doctors from the Rudolfinerhaus clinic in Vienna say "there is no doubt" Ukrainian opposition leader Victor Yushchenko was poisoned with Dioxin.
ref: Dokter dari klinik Rudolfinerhaus di Wina mengatakan "tidak ada keraguan" pemimpin oposisi Ukraina Victor Yushchenko diracun dengan Dioxin.

src: Yushchenko's body had about 1,000 times more than the normal concentration of the toxin.
ref: Tubuh Yushchenko memiliki sekitar lebih 1.000 kali dibanding dengan kadar normal toksin.

src: It is unknown if there were any other poisons in his system.
ref: Tidak diketahui apakah ada racun lain dalam sistem tubuhnya.

src: Although it has not yet been proven that the poisoning was deliberate, doctors suspect it was.
ref: Meskipun belum terbukti bahwa keracunan itu disengaja, dokter menduga hal itu.

src: "We suspect a cause triggered by a third party," said Michael Zimpfer, head doctor at the Rudolfinerhaus clinic.
ref: "Kami menduga penyebabnya dipicu oleh pihak ketiga, " kata Michael Zimpfer, dokter kepala di klinik Rudolfinerhaus.

src: He suggested the poison may have been administered orally, through food or drink.
ref: Dia menduga racun mungkin diberikan secara oral, melalui makanan atau minuman.

src: Today's announcements are a follow-up of an earlier press conference, where Dr. Korpan that there were three hypotheses under consideration, one of them involving dioxin.
ref: Pengumuman hari ini adalah tindak lanjut dari konferensi pers sebelumnya, dimana Dr Korpan menduga bahwa ada 3 hipotesis yang dipertimbangkan, salah satunya melibatkan dioxin.

src: He did not reveal what the other two hypotheses were.
ref: Dia tidak mengungkapkan apa 2 hipotesis lainnya.

src: Dr. Michael Zimpfer, director of the Rudolfinerhaus clinic emphasized that time there was no proof yet to specify the substance causing the illness.
ref: Dr Michael Zimpfer, direktur klinik Rudolfinerhaus menekankan bahwa saat itu belum ada bukti yang menentukan substansi yang menyebabkan penyakit.

src: Yushchenko left Kiev on Friday (2004-10-12) for further examination in Vienna.
ref: Yuschenko meninggalkan Kiev, Jumat (2004/10/12) untuk pemeriksaan lebih lanjut di Wina.

src: When Yushchenko fell ill on October 6th, Ukrainian doctors had initially diagnosed food poisoning, leading to speculation that he had been poisoned deliberately.
ref: Ketika Yushchenko jatuh sakit pada 6 Oktober, dokter Ukraina awalnya mendiagnosis keracunan makanan, yang mengarah ke spekulasi bahwa ia telah diracun dengan sengaja.

src: The illness has disfigured Yushchenko's body and face which doctors say could take up to two years to heal.
ref: Penyakit ini telah rusak tubuh dan wajah Yushchenko dokter mengatakan bisa memakan waktu hingga 2 tahun untuk menyembuhkannya.

src: He fell seriously ill on the September 6th, during his presidential campaign.
ref: Dia sakit parah pada 6 September, selama kampanye presiden.

src: Yushchenko was taken to the Rudolfinerhaus clinic of Vienna, where he stayed for four days under Dr. Korpan's care.
ref: Yuschenko dibawa ke klinik Rudolfinerhaus di Wina, ia tinggal selama 4 hari di bawah perawatan Dr Korpan.

src: He was diagnosed with "acute pancreatitis, accompanied by interstitial edematous changes."
ref: Dia didiagnosis dengan "pankreatitis akut, disertai dengan perubahan edema interstitial."

src: These symptoms were said to be due to "a serious viral infection and chemical substances which are not normally found in food products" as his campaign officials put it.
ref: Gejala ini dikatakan karena "infeksi virus yang serius dan zat kimia yang tidak biasanya ditemukan di produk makanan" yang diletakkan petugas kampanye.

src: In laymans terms, he developed an infection in the pancreas and got a bad skin condition that disfigured his face with cysts and lesions.
ref: Dalam teori laymans, ia mengembangkan infeksi pada pankreas dan mendapat kondisi kulit buruk yang merusak wajahnya dengan kista dan lesi.

src: The skin condition has similarities with the chloracne associated with dioxin posioning according to a British toxicologist John Henry.
ref: Kondisi kulit memiliki kesamaan dengan chloracne terkait dengan keracunan dioksin menurut ahli toksikologi Inggris John Henry.

src: Newly named Prime Minister of France Dominique de Villepin has had his cabinet accepted by President of the Republic Jacques Chirac.
ref: Perdana Menteri baru Perancis Dominique de Villepin dan jajaran kabinetnya diterima oleh President Republik Jacques Chirac.

src: Head of the majority Union for a Popular Movement (UMP) party, Nicolas Sarkozy, comes as a second-in-command as Minister of the Interior, with the honorific rank of Minister of State.
ref: Ketua partai mayoritas Union for a Popular Movement (UMP), Nicolas Sarkozy, datang sebagai wakil komandan Menteri Dalam Negeri, dengan gelar kehormatan Menteri Negara.

src: The Ministry of the Interior is traditionally one of the most important positions in the cabinet, with that of Finances; the Minister of the Interior is in charge, notably, of law enforcement and relationships with local governments.
ref: Menteri Dalam Negeri secara tradisional merupakan salah satu posisi yang paling penting di dalam kabinet, dengan Keuangan; Menteri Dalam Negeri bertanggung jawab, khususnya, penegakan hukum dan hubungan dengan pemerintah daerah.

src: There is some uneasiness in having the head of a party in a position that is partly in charge of electoral redistrictings.
ref: Ada beberapa keresahan saat ketua partai menjabat sebagian penentu wilayah pemilihan umum.

src: Also, this arrangement creates a peculiar situation: it is public knowledge that Villepin and Sarkozy consider each other a dangerous political rival with respect to the 2007 presidential election, and they are widely said to loathe each other.
ref: Juga, pengaturan ini memunculkan hal yang ganjil: seperti yang diketahui masyarakat luas bahwa Villepin dan Sarkozy saling menganggap satu sama lain sebagai lawan politik yang berbahaya menanggapi pemilihan presiden 2007, dan secara terbuka mereka berkata saling membenci.

src: However, as many as 31 ministers, delegate ministers and secretaries of state were named; still, this is a reduction from the preceding 43.
ref: Namun, sebanyak 31 menteri, wakil menteri dan sekretaris negara yang bernama; masih, ini adalah pengurangan dari yang sebelumnya 43.

src: While the cabinet is for a large part copied from the preceding one, some ministers who had provoked controversy and animosity were removed or moved to another less risky position.
ref: Susunan kabinet sebagian besar berisi salinan dari kabinet yang telah lalu, beberapa menteri yang memicu kontriversi dan kekacauan dihapus atau dipindah ke posisi lain yang kurang beresiko.

src: Dominique Perben, who pushed for controversial law which opponents allege curtail fundamental constitutional freedoms while Minister of Justice, was moved to the less sensitive position of Minister of Transportation and Equipment.
ref: Dominique Perben, yang telah mengeluarkan undang-undang kontroversial yang membatasi kebebasan konstitusi ketika menjabat sebagai Menteri Kehakiman, kini dipindah ke posisi yang kurang sensitif sebagai Menteri Transportasi dan Perlengkapan.

src: It is also possible that the movement of Brigitte Girardin from Minister for the Oversea (relationships with French overseas departments and territories) to (international) Cooperation was motivated by the crisis that occurred in French Polynesia between Gaston Flosse and his opponent Oscar Temaru.
ref: Hal ini juga memungkinkan bahwa gerakan Brigitte Girardin dari Menteri Luar Negeri (hubungan dengan wilayah dan depertemen luar negeri Perancis) ke (internasional) Kerjasama dimotivasi oleh krisis yang terjadi di Polinesia Perancis antara Gaston Flosse dan lawan politiknya Oscar Temaru.

src: While the Union for French Democracy (UDF) party, led by François Bayrou, formally remains in the ruling coalition along with the UMP, it has decided that, because the new government would probably do more of the same policies, it would not participate in it.
ref: Sementara itu Union for French Democracy (UDF), yang dipimpin oleh Francois Bayrou, secara resmi tetap dalam koalisi bersama dengan UMP, telah memutuskan bahwa, mungkin saja pemerintahan yang baru akan melakukan lebih dari kebijakan yang sama, itu tidak akan berpartisipasi didalamnya.

src: The only member of the government from UDF is Gilles de Robien, as in the preceding government.
ref: Satu-satunya anggota pemerintahan dari UDF adalah Gilles de Robien, seperti dalam pemerintahan sebelumnya.

src: Previous head of government Jean-Pierre Raffarin had lost the confidence of the French, with polls putting him as low as 22% confidence.
ref: Pemimpin sebelumnya Jean-Pierre Raffarin telah kehilangan kepercayaan rakyat Perancis, dengan nilai polling yang menempatkannya dengan kepercayaan terendah sebesar 22%.

src: President Chirac's confidence among the citizenry is also a record low of 24%.
ref: Tingkat kepercayaan masyarakat terhadap Presiden Chirac juga tercatat turun menjadi 24%.

src: She received 68 percent of the vote after 96 percent of the ballots were tallied.
ref: Dia menerima 68 persen voting setelah 96 persen surat suara selesai dihitung.

src: Turnout in the elections was reported at slightly more than fifty percent.
ref: Keberalihan dalam pemilihan umum dilaporkan sedikit lebih dari lima puluh persen.

src: A candidate must win at least half the vote in order to avoid a run-off election if the turnout is over 50%.
ref: Seorang kandidat harus memenangkan sedikitnya separuh voting untuk menghindari sebuah pemilihan ulang bila keberalihan diatas 50%.

src: With voter turnout at less than 50%, a candidate needs at least 33% support from all persons eligible to cast a ballot.
ref: Dengan keberalihan pemilih kurang dari 50%, seorang kandidat memerlukan paling sedikit 33% dukungan dari seluruh masyarakat yang memenuhi syarat untuk memasukkan surat suara.

src: I congratulate the Lithuanian people for their choice, she said at her election headquarters.
ref: Saya mengucapkan selamat kepada masyarakat Lithuania untuk pilihan mereka, katanya di markas pemilihan umumnya.

src: As reported the United Nations, January 12 Haiti earthquake left exactly 222,570 deaths, 1,300,000 refugees in harbours, 766,000 displaced people, 310,000 injured and 869 disappeared.
ref: Seperti yang dilaporkan oleh Perserikatan Bangsa-Bangsa, pada tanggal 12 Januari gempa bumi di Haiti tepatnya meninggalkan 222.570 tewas, 1. 300.000 pengungsi di pelabuhan, 766.000 pengungsi, 310.000 cedera dan 869 hilang.

src: The report also mentioned economic loss suffered by the country, that reached 7.754 billion dollars, leaving 71 percent of the Haitians in extreme poverty.
ref: Laporannya juga menyebutkan penderitaan hilangnya ekonomi bagi negara tersebut, yang menjangkau 7,754 milyar dolar, meninggalkan 71 persen rakyat Haiti dalam kemiskinan.

src: The document was diffused in Santo Domingo de Guzmán, between the preparatives of a conference about the reconstruction of Haiti, that will take place next March 11 in New York.
ref: Dokumen tersebut disebarkan di Santo Domingo de Guzman, diantara persiapan konferensi tentang rekonstruksi Haiti, yang akan berlangsung pada 11 Maret yang akan datang di New York.

src: Haitian Government representatives have asked to donors an additional help of 350 million dollars for the Haiti reconstruction, the most poor country in the Americas.
ref: Wakil dari pemerintah Haiti telah minta pada donatur pemberi bantuan dari 350 juta dolar untuk rekonstruksi Haiti, negara paling miskin di Amerika.

src: The damages report was prepared by the Haitian Government with the support of the Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean, the Interamerican Development Bank, the World Bank, the United Nations and the European Union.
ref: Laporan kerusakan sudah disiapkan oleh Pemerintah Haiti dengan dukungan dari Komisi Ekonomi untuk Amerika Latin dan Karibia, Bank Pembangunan Interamerican, Bank Dunia, Perserikatan Bangsa-Bangsa dan Uni Eropa.

src: England have beaten India by 104 runs in the first One-Day International of the Indian tour of England at the Rose Bowl, Hampshire, England.
ref: Inggris telah mengalahkan India dengan 104 angka pada One-Day Internasional pertama dari tur India Inggris di Rose Bowl, Hampshire, Inggris.

src: England's batsmen started quietly, reaching 43-1 in the eleventh over when Matt Prior was caught off Zaheer Khan's bowling.
ref: Pemukul Inggris mulai tenang, meraih 43-1 di sebelas babak ketika Matt Prior menangkap lemparan Zaheer Khan.

src: Alastair Cook and Ian Bell shared a 178-run partnership, with Cook reaching his maiden one-day century before being bowled by Yuvraj Singh.
ref: Alastair Cook dan Ian Bell berbagi kerjasama 178-angka, dengan Cook meraih one-day century pertamanya sebelum akhirnya dilempar oleh Yuvraj Singh.

src: Soon afterwards, Bell reached his first one-day century, and finished the innings on 126 not out.
ref: Segera kemudian, Bell mencapai one-day century pertama, dan mengakhiri babak dengan 126 tidak keluar.

src: Kevin Pietersen added 33 runs off 25 balls and England finished their 50 overs with a score of 288-2.
ref: Kevin Pietersen menambah 33 angka dari 25 bola dan Inggris menyelesaikan lebih dari 50 babak dengan angka 288-2.

src: The second ODI will take place at the County Ground, Bristol, on 24 August.
ref: ODI yang kedua akan terjadi County Ground, di Bristol, pada tanggal 24 Agustus.

src: Earlier in the month, India won a three-match Test series 1-0.
ref: Pada awal bulan, India memenangkan tiga- pertandingan seri Uji 1-0.

src: Kenya's new Parliament convened for the first time since the country's disputed December 27 election, but politician's on opposing sides took part in a heated discussion over who would be the new speaker of the party.
ref: Parlemen baru di Kenya memanggil rapat pertama sejak negara disengketakan pemilihan pada tanggal 27 Desember, akan tetapi politikus yang pihak oposisi ikutserta diskusi yang panas akan menjadi pembicara baru di partainya.

src: Kenyan opposition politicians argued with followers of re-elected President Mwai Kibaki over how to pick a new parliamentary speaker.
ref: Politikus oposisi Kenya membantah dengan pengikut Presiden Mwai Kibaki yang terpilih kembali bagimana memilih pembicara parlemen baru.

src: When a discussion into how the speaker should be decided started, lawmakers with Raila Odinaga's opposition Orange Democratic Movement insisted the election for speaker be held by open ballot; Mr. Kibaki's supporters demanded the vote be secret.
ref: Ketika satu diskusi masuk bagimana pembicara harus memastikan mulai, pembuat undang-undang dengan Raila Odinaga yang oposisi Gerakan Demokrasi Jeruk bersikeras pemilihan untuk pembicara dilakukan oleh suara terbuka; pendukung Bapak Kibaki meminta suara dengan rahasia.

src: The discussion took place for over an hour politicians from both sides took part in a discussion where anger was clearly shown, before the two parties decided a secret ballot was acceptable.
ref: Diskusi telah berlangsung lebih dari satu jam dengan politikus dari kedua belah pihak mengikutserta diskusinya dimana kemarahan diperlihatkan dengan jelas, setelah dua partai menentukan suara rahasia telah diterima.

src: The standing orders are very clear that members will be given a ballot.
ref: Peraturan tata tertib adalah sangat jelas yang angota akan memberikan suara.

src: Can you show us where it says secret ballot?
ref: Apakah Anda bisa beritahukan kami dimana mengatakan suara rahasia?

src: We went into election with secret ballot, you stole the vote, we cannot trust you anymore, said William Ruto, a senior adviser for Odigna.
ref: Kita telah pergi ke pemilihan dengan suara rahasia, Anda mencuri suara, jadi kami tidak percaya Anda lagi, William Ruto mengatakan, salah satu senior penasehat untuk Odigna.

src: After a first round of voting, the Orange Democratic Movement candidate had a narrow lead, necessitating another ballot.
ref: Setelah pemilihan pertama, calon Gerakan Demokrasi Jeruk memimpin sempit, meperlukan suara rahasia yang lain.

src: If no-one gets two-thirds majority after two rounds the speaker will be elected by a simple majority in the third round.
ref: Kalau tidak seorang pun dapat dua pertiga mayoritas setelah pembicara yang babak kedua akan dipilikan oleh mayoritas di babak ketiga.

src: It was an argument like that seen in Parliament that has led many Kenyans to say they have felt abandoned by their leaders in the weeks of chaos that followed the December 27 vote.
ref: Percekcokan seperti terlihat di Parlemen yang banyak warga Kenya megatakan bahwa mereka telah merasa ditinggal oleh para pemimpin pada beberapa minggu yang kekacau-bulauan yang diikuti pada hari 27 Desember yang pemilihan.

src: Eleven people have died after a military helicopter crashed during an anti-narcotics flight in Western Mexico.
ref: Sebelas orang tewas setelah sebuah helikopter militer jatuh dalam sebuah penerbangan anti narkotika di Meksiko Timur.

src: Michoacan is a major area in Mexico's anti-narcotics operations, which are conducted by the nation's military.
ref: Michoacan adalah sebuah arena utama dalam operasi anti narkotika di Meksiko yang diadakan oleh militer negara.

src: Police cordoned off the scene and forensic officers have moved in to examine the site.
ref: Polisi telah mengepung tempat kejadian dan petugas forensik telah masuk untuk memeriksa lokasi.

src: There are 11 men dead, including a colonel, and one soldier was injured, said a state attorney general's office spokesman.
ref: Ada 11 orang pria tewas, termasuk seorang kolonel, dan satu prajurit terluka, kata seorang juru bicara kantor jaksa agung negara bagian.

src: The wounded soldier, who was the sole survivor, was flown to a Mexico City military hospital, and remains there in a serious condition.
ref: Prajurit yang terluka, yang merupakan satu-satunya korban selamat, telah diterbangkan ke rumah sakit militer di Mexico City, dan tetap di sana dalam kondisi yang serius.

src: Although authorities released no crash details, witnesses say the helicopter lost power during attempts to land.
ref: Meskipun pihak berwenang tidak mengeluarkan penjelasan tentang kecelakaan, para saksi mengatakan bahwa helikopter kehilangan daya pada saat berusaha mendarat.

src: The motor stopped and the helicopter plummeted to the ground, said one local resident named Agustin Vargas.
ref: Motornya berhenti dan helikopter terguling ke tanah, kata seorang penduduk lokal yang bernama Agustin Vargas.

src: The flight had been headed to a marijuana field with the intention of raiding it.
ref: Penerbangan tersebut ditujukan ke ladang mariyuana dengan tujuan untuk menyerangnya.

src: On November 13, Torontonians will be heading to the polls to vote for their ward's councillor and for mayor.
ref: Pada tanggal 13 November, warga Toronto akan menuju ke tempat pemungutan suara untuk memilih anggota dewan wilayah mereka dan walikota.

src: This ward's candidates include John Blair, Robertson Boyle, Tony Dickins, Cliff Jenkins (incumbent), and Peter Kapsalis.
ref: Kandidat wilayah ini termasuk John Blair, Robertson Boyle, Tony Dickins, Cliff Jenkins (petahana), dan Peter Kapsalis.

src: For more information on the election, read Toronto municipal election, 2006.
ref: Untuk informasi lebih lanjut tentang pemilu, baca pemilu kota Toronto, 2006.

src: A United States Apache military helicopter has been shot down in Baghdad, Iraq says a military spokesman.
ref: Sebuah helikopter militer Apache Amerika Serikat telah ditembak jatuh di Baghdad, Irak kata seorang juru bicara militer.

src: Reports say that the chopper went down near the U.S. air base, Taji, located just north of downtown Baghdad.
ref: Laporan mengatakan bahwa helikopter tersebut jatuh di dekat pangkalan udara AS, Taji, yang terletak di utara pusat kota Baghdad.

src: "I can confirm that we are looking into reports that a helicopter went down north of Baghdad," said Lt. Col. Josslyn Aberle, a spokeswoman for the U.S. military.
ref: "Saya dapat memastikan bahwa kami melihat laporan bahwa helikopter jatuh di utara Baghdad, " kata Letnan Kolonel Josslyn Aberle, juru bicara militer AS.

src: At least 2 soldiers were on board the aircraft, but their condition is not known.
ref: Sedikitnya 2 tentara berada di dalam pesawat, tapi kondisi mereka tidak diketahui.

src: Witnesses near the scene and police say that at least 2 Apaches were flying together when insurgents began to shoot at the choppers, shooting one of them down and hitting the other, but the helicopter still managed to fly away.
ref: Saksi mata dekat tempat kejadian dan polisi mengatakan bahwa sedikitnya 2 Apache terbang bersama-sama ketika pemberontak mulai menembak helikopter, menembak jatuh salah satu dari mereka dan menyentuh yang lain, tapi helikopter masih berhasil terbang.

src: The helicopters were believed to have been escorting a U.S. military convoy on the ground when shots were fired.
ref: Helikopter tersebut diyakini telah mengawal konvoi militer AS di darat saat tembakan dilepaskan.

src: "The chopper was swinging around before it hit the ground one kilometer away from me and I heard a big explosion," said local farmer, Hashim Assafi who also said that he had to find shelter as shots were fired in the direction of the helicopters.
ref: "Helikopter tersebut berayun berputar sebelum menyentuh tanah 1 kilometer dari saya dan saya mendengar ledakan besar, " kata petani lokal, Hashim Assafi yang juga mengatakan bahwa ia harus mencari tempat berlindung karena tembakan yang mengarah ke helikopter.

src: In a statement posted on an Al-Qaeda in Iraq website, insurgents claim responsibility for shooting down the helicopter.
ref: Dalam pernyataan yang dimuat Al-Qaeda di situs Irak, pemberontak mengklaim bertanggung jawab atas penembakan jatuh helikopter.

src: "We say to the enemies of God that the sky of the Islamic state of Iraq is forbidden just like its land," said the statement.
ref: "Kami katakan kepada musuh-musuh Allah bahwa langit negara Islam Irak terlarang sama seperti tanahnya, " kata pernyataan tersebut.

src: This is the fourth helicopter operated by the U.S. military to crash or be shot down in two weeks.
ref: Ini adalah helikopter keempat yang dioperasikan oleh militer AS yang jatuh atau ditembak jatuh dalam 2 minggu.

src: What is believed to be the world's oldest leather shoe, over 5,500 year old, has been found in a cave in Armenia by a team of archaeologists.
ref: Apa yang diyakini sebagai sepatu kulit tertua di dunia, berusia lebih dari 5.500 tahun, ditemukan di sebuah gua di Armenia oleh tim arkeolog.

src: The Armenian shoe is in a perfectly preserved condition and is a few hundred years older than the one found on Ötzi the Iceman, making it the oldest piece of leather footwear in the world, and the oldest footwear yet found in Europe.
ref: Sepatu Armenia dalam kondisi diawetkan sempurna dan beberapa ratus tahun lebih tua daripada yang ditemukan di Ötzi Iceman, membuatnya menjadi potongan alas kaki kulit tertua di dunia, dan alas kaki tertua yang pernah ditemukan di Eropa.

src: The leather shoe was found in a cave dubbed Areni-1, near the village of Areni in the Vayots Dzor province of Armenia, on the Iranian and Turkish borders.
ref: Sepatu kulit ditemukan di sebuah gua yang dijuluki Areni-1, dekat desa Areni di provinsi Vayots Dzor Armenia, di perbatasan Iran dan Turki.

src: "I was amazed to find that even the shoe-laces were preserved," recalled Diana Zardaryan, the Armenian PhD student who made the discovery.
ref: "Saya terkejut menemukannya meskipun itu sepatu tali yang diawetkan, " kenang Diana Zardaryan, mahasiswa PhD Armenia yang telah menemukan.

src: According to researchers, the shoe, made of cow-hide, consists of only one leather piece and was probably customised to the wearer's foot.
ref: Menurut para peneliti, sepatu, terbuat dari kulit sapi, hanya terdiri dari 1 bagian kulit dan mungkin disesuaikan dengan kaki pemakainya.

src: It was relatively small, measuring the corresponding to European size 37 or US size 7 women, however, it could have been worn by a man.
ref: Itu relatif kecil, pengukuran yang disesuaikan dengan ukuran 37 Eropa atau ukuran 7 wanita AS, namun, itu bisa saja dipakai oleh laki-laki.

src: It was kept in excellent condition by a thick layer of sheep excrement, which acted as a seal, helping it survive the millennia.
ref: Itu telah disimpan dalam kondisi sangat baik oleh lapisan tebal kotoran domba, yang bertindak sebagai segel, membantunya bertahan ribuan tahun.

src: The shoe contained grass, although the archaeologists were uncertain as to whether this was to used to maintain the shape of the shoe and/or prepare it for storage.
ref: Sepatu tersebut mengandung rumput, meskipun para arkeolog tidak yakin apakah ini digunakan untuk mempertahankan bentuk sepatu dan/atau mempersiapkannya untuk penyimpanan.

src: "We thought initially that the shoe and other objects were about 600-700 years old because they were in such good condition," said co-author Dr. Ron Pinhasi from the University College Cork in Ireland.
ref: "Kami pikir pada awalnya sepatu dan benda-benda lainnya berusia sekitar 600-700 tahun karena mereka berada dalam kondisi baik seperti itu, " kata rekan penulis Dr Ron Pinhasi dari University College Cork di Irlandia.

src: The shoe and the cave will continue to be researched.
ref: Sepatu dan gua akan terus diteliti.

src: "We do not know yet what the shoe or other objects were doing in the cave or what the purpose of the cave was," said Pinhasi, "We know that there are children's graves at the back of the cave but so little is known about this period that we cannot say with any certainty why all these different objects were found together".
ref: "Kami belum tahu apa guna sepatu atau benda-benda lain di gua atau apa tujuan dari gua itu, " kata Pinhasi, "Kami tahu bahwa ada kuburan anak-anak di belakang gua tapi begitu sedikit yang diketahui tentang periode ini sehingga kita tidak bisa mengatakan dengan pasti mengapa semua benda-benda berbeda ini ditemukan bersama-sama."

src: Currently, the oldest known footwear are sandals made from sagebrush bark, found in Fort Rock Cave, Oregon in the United States.
ref: Saat ini, alas kaki tertua yang diketahui adalah sandal yang terbuat dari kulit kayu semak-semak, ditemukan di Fort Rock Cave, Oregon di Amerika Serikat.

src: These shoes were discovered in 1938, and have been dated to about 10,000 years before present.
ref: Sepatu ini ditemukan pada tahun 1938, dan telah tertanggal sekitar 10.000 tahun sebelum sekarang.

src: Discoveries within the cave move early bronze-age cultural activity in Armenia back by about 800 years.
ref: Penemuan dalam gua memindahkan kegiatan budaya awal zaman perunggu di Armenia ke sekitar 800 tahun.

src: Additional discoveries yielded an extensive array of Copper Age artifacts dating to between 6,200 and 5,900 years ago.
ref: Penemuan tambahan menghasilkan deretan lebih luas dari artefak Zaman Tembaga tertanggal antara 6.200 dan 5.900 tahun lalu.

src: On December 22, 2006 Microsoft has announced that it has extended its warranty for all Xbox 360 video game consoles to one year in the United States.
ref: Pada 22 Desember 2006 Microsoft mengumumkan bahwa mereka telah memperpanjang garansi untuk semua konsol video game Xbox 360 untuk 1 tahun di Amerika Serikat.

src: While this one year warranty applies to all Xbox 360 software as well, Xbox 360 accessories will still carry their original 90 day warranty.
ref: Meskipun garansi 1 tahun ini berlaku untuk semua perangkat lunak Xbox 360, Xbox 360 aksesoris tetap membawa garansi aslinya 90 hari.

src: "Customers that experience hardware issues with their Xbox 360 within one year of purchase will have their consoles repaired at no cost."
ref: "Pelanggan yang mengalami masalah perangkat keras dengan Xbox 360 mereka dalam 1 tahun pembelian maka konsol mereka akan diperbaiki tanpa biaya."

src: "Moreover, the new warranty policy is retroactive, so consumers that may have already paid for out-of-warranty Xbox 360 repair within one year of the console's purchase will be eligible for reimbursement of their console repair charges."
ref: "Selain itu, kebijakan garansi baru tersebut berlaku surut, sehingga konsumen yang mungkin sudah membayar garansi perbaikan Xbox 360 dalam 1 tahun pembelian konsol karena di luar garansi, akan memenuhi syarat untuk penggantian biaya perbaikan konsol mereka."

src: This extension should help ease customers' minds who have been concerned with the Xbox 360's reputation for hardware failures.
ref: Perpanjangan ini akan membantu menenangkan pikiran pelanggan yang peduli dengan reputasi Xbox 360 untuk kerusakan perangkat keras.

src: A partial list of hardware issues can be found here: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Xbox_360_technical_problems
ref: Daftar sebagian dari masalah hardware dapat ditemukan di sini: http://en. wikipedia.org/wiki/Xbox_360_technical_problems

src: People who have paid for Xbox 360 repair will be automatically distributed a reimbursement check in about 10 weeks from the present date.
ref: Bagi yang membayar untuk perbaikan Xbox 360 secara otomatis dikirimkan cek penggantian dalam waktu sekitar 10 minggu dari tanggal sekarang.

src: Previously in September, 2006, Microsoft had waived the cost for repairs on all Xbox 360 consoles made before January 1, 2006, and refunded any fees already paid.
ref: Sebelumnya pada bulan September 2006, Microsoft telah meghapuskan biaya perbaikan untuk semua konsol Xbox 360 yang dibuat sebelum 1 Januari 2006, dan telah mengembalikan segala biaya yang sudah dibayar.

src: A leak at an offshore oil drilling rig has caused an oil slick off Australia's coast.
ref: Kebocoran pada anjungan pengeboran minyak lepas pantai telah menyebabkan tumpahan minyak di pantai Australia.

src: According to the rig's operator, it could take weeks to fully plug it.
ref: Menurut operator anjungan, itu bisa memakan waktu berminggu untuk memasang sepenuhnya.

src: Gas and oil started leaking from a hole beneath the sea floor on early Friday.
ref: Gas dan minyak mulai bocor dari lubang di lantai bawah dasar laut pada Jumat pagi.

src: It has caused an oil slick about nine miles long and thirty yards wide．
ref: Hal ini telah menyebabkan tumpahan minyak sepanjang sekitar 9 mil dan selebar 30 yard.

src: Officials, however, said that there was no threat to the environment and it was improbable the slick would reach the Australian coast.
ref: Bagaimanapun juga, pejabat, mengatakan bahwa tidak ada ancaman terhadap lingkungan dan tidak mungkin tumpahan akan mencapai pantai Australia.

src: Resources Minister Martin Ferguson said that "there's no threat to the Australian coast."
ref: Menteri Sumber Daya Martin Ferguson mengatakan bahwa "tidak ada ancaman bagi pantai Australia."

src: "It is evaporating naturally and the work of the Australian Maritime Safety Authority will merely assist in that evaporation."
ref: "Itu akan menguap secara alami dan pekerjaan Otoritas Keselamatan Maritim Australia hanya akan membantu dalam penguapan itu."

src: 69 people were evacuated from the rig on Friday, amid fears that a fire could start from the condensate oil.
ref: 69 orang dievakuasi dari anjungan pada hari Jumat, di tengah kekhawatiran bahwa api bisa mulai dari minyak hasil penyulingan.

src: The rig is located approximately 150 miles off the coast of Kimberley.
ref: Anjungan ini terletak sekitar 150 mil di lepas pantai Kimberley.

src: Two train derailments in two days have closed railway lines in Australia.
ref: 2 kereta api tergelincir dari rel dalam 2 hari jalur jalan kereta api ditutup di Australia.

src: A Rio Tinto iron ore train derailled at Pilbara, on a spur of the Tom Price to Dampier line on Thursday 29.
ref: Lapisan biji besi kereta api Rio Tinto tergelincir di Pilbara, terdorong dari jalur Tomp Price ke Dampier pada hari Kamis tanggal 29.

src: The following day, a freight train with 40 wagons derailed east of Kalgoorlie, injuring three people.
ref: Hari berikutnya, sebuah kereta api pemuat barang dengan gerbong 40 tergelincir ke sebelah timur Kalgoorlie, 3 orang terluka.

src: The second derailment has closed the line used by the long distance Sydney to Perth Indian Pacific passenger train.
ref: Kejadian kedua telah menutup jalur yang digunakan oleh penumpang kereta api jarak jauh dari Sydney ke Perth Indian Pacific.

src: Operators Great Southern Railway expect to lose A$500,000 revenues as the line remains closed until at least Thursday.
ref: Para operator Great Southern Railway menduga akan kehilangan pendapatan 500.000 AUD ketika jalur tetap ditutup paling lama sampai hari Kamis.

src: Police say heavy rain has affected the area, and the federal Australian Rail Track Corporation say that a new access road needs to be built in order to clear the wreckage and repair the track.
ref: Polisi mengatakan hujan lebat mempengaruhi area itu, dan Korporasi Rail Track Pemerintahan Pusat Australia mengatakan bahwa jalan akses baru harus dibangun dalam rangka membersihkan kepingan sisa-sisa bencana dan memperbaiki rel.

src: Rio Tinto have sufficient stocks of iron ore already in place to keep working.
ref: Rio Tinto mempunyai persediaan secukupnya lapisan biji besi pada tempatnya untuk terus bekerja.

src: However, the freight train was carrying consumer products, which may run short in the south of Western Australia in the next few days.
ref: Akan tetapi, kereta api pemuat barang tersebut membawa barang-barang konsumen, yang boleh kehabisan di sebelah selatan Australia Barat pada beberapa hari kedepan.

src: The Kalgoorie crash is to be investigated by the Australian Transport Safety Bureau, while maintenance company Transfield Services will also be examining the incident.
ref: Benturan di Kalgoorie diselidiki oleh Biro Keamanan Transportasi Australia, sementara perusahaan pemeliharaan Transfield Services juga akan menyelidiki peristiwa tersebut.

src: Eight Hungarian migrant workers sacked from a Domino's Pizza franchise in Derby, England are said to have taken home virtually no pay for months because of illegal deductions.
ref: 8 pekerja migran Hongaria dirampas haknya dari sebuah Franchise Pizza Domino di Derby, England mengatakan membawa ke rumah pada hakekatnya tidak ada upah selama berbulan-bulan karena pengurangan tidak sah.

src: The claim is refuted by the company who said in a statement "We have begun a thorough investigation during which we have scrutinised the franchisee's employment practices."
ref: Gugatan disangkal oleh perusahaan dia mengatakan dalam sebuah pernyataan "Kami akan memulai dengan sebuah penyelidikan seksama selama memeriksa pelatihan karyawan franchisee."

src: "The franchisee concerned is confident that he possesses the evidence required to refute these allegations."
ref: "Franchisee menaruh perhatian bahwa dia yakin dalam proses pembuktian diperlukan penyangkalan atas dugaan-dugaan ini."

src: "To the extent that we have been informed of all allegations and have reviewed all available evidence, we also believe this to be the case."
ref: "Untuk keluasan informasi yang kami dapat atas semua dugaan dan telah meninjau semua bukti yang ada, kami juga percaya ini akan menjadi kasus."

src: The sacked workers are being supported in their claim by the workers union Unite.
ref: Perampasan hak pekerja tergalang dalam gugatan oleh penyatuan perserikatan para pekerja.

src: The union say the "there appeared to be a deliberate strategy of keeping the workers in debt to the company through a series of crippling deductions."
ref: Perserikatan berkata "disana nampak ada strategi yang sengaja agar para pekerja tetap berhutang kepada perusahaan terus-menerus terjadi pengurangan upah."

src: "The deductions included payments to cover the contract purchase of a car from their employer, insurance for the vehicle provided through their employer, and exorbitant rent for substandard accommodation, again provided through their employer."
ref: "Pengurangan termasuk pembayaran untuk menutupi kontrak pembelian sebuah mobil dari karyawan mereka, asuransi untuk kendaraan disiapkan melalui karyawan mereka, dan sewa terlalu tinggi untuk akomodasi dibawah standar, sekali lagi disiapkan melalui karyawan mereka."

src: In addition, some workers had to pay fees of up to £180 for an "introduction" to the company.
ref: Sebagai tambahan, beberapa pekerja harus membayar biaya sampai 180 euro atas sebuah "pengenalan" kepada perusahaan.

src: One worker earned just £5 in four months because of the constant and hefty deductions out of his wage packet.
ref: 1 orang pekerja berpendapatan 5 euro dalam 4 bulan dikarenakan ketetapan dan pengurangan yang besar berdasarkan perjanjian upahnya.

src: Spencer Dryden, the drummer of the legendary American rock band Jefferson Airplane, passed away on Tuesday, Jan. 11.
ref: Spencer Dryden, pemain drum band rock Amerika yang lengendaris Jeffersson Airplane, meninggal pada hari Selasa, 11 Januari.

src: Spencer Dryden was a member of Jefferson Airplane during the band's heyday.
ref: Spencer Dryden anggota dari Jefferson Airplane semasa kejayaan band tersebut.

src: He replaced original drummer Skip Spence and played with Jefferson Airplane at the legendary Woodstock and Altamont rock festivals.
ref: Dia menggantikan pemain drum asli Skip Spence dan bermain dengan Jefferson Airplane legendaris Woodstock dan festival-festival Altamont rock.

src: Dryden left the band in 1970 to play with New Riders of The Purple Sage, a country rock band formed by members of the Grateful Dead.
ref: Dryden meninggalkan band tersebut di 1970 untuk bermain dengan New Riders pada Purple Sage, sebuah band rock country dibentuk oleh anggota Grateful Dead.

src: He was married three times and is survived by sons Jeffrey, Jes and Jackson Dryden.
ref: Dia menikah 3 kali dan selamat memiliki anak-anak Jeffrey, Jes dan Jackson Dryden.

src: The National Weather Service announced that some 27 inches of snow was measured at 4:10 p.m. EST at Central Park in New York City today, breaking a record set in 1947.
ref: Departemen Cuaca Nasional mengumumkan bahwa sementara salju 27 inci diukur pada pukul 4.10 sore EST di Central Park di Kota New York hari ini, menghapus rekaman mulai 1947.

src: This after a day of snowfall and storms in the Northeastern United States.
ref: Setelah seharian ini salju turun dan badai di Timur Laut Amerika Serikat.

src: The poor weather conditions prompted the shutdown of LaGuardia, John F. Kennedy, and Newark International Airports.
ref: Kondisi cuaca buruk menutup jalan LaGuardia, John F. Kennedy, dan Bandara Internasional Newark.

src: Delta Airlines also canceled flights in and out of Washington, Philadelphia, Baltimore, Providence, and Hartford.
ref: Maskapai Penerbangan Delta juga membatalkan penerbangan ke dalam dan ke luar Washington, Philadelphia, Baltimore, Providence, dan Hartford.

src: In Massachusetts, heavy snow and blizzard warnings were in effect as visibility had been greatly hindered by the falling snow.
ref: Di Massachusetts, sangat bersalju dan peringatan badai salju disertai angin kencang berlaku ketika jarak penglihatan sangat dihalangi oleh salju yang turun.

src: There were other reports of near-blizzard conditions in parts of Connecticut, and Rhode Island.
ref: Ada laporan lainnya kondisi dekat-badai salju di bagian Connecticut, dan Rhode Island.

src: Adding to the storm, wind gusts as high as 60 mph in New England prompted concerns over coastal flooding.
ref: Tambahan badai, angin kencang setinggi 60 mph di New England sangat khawatir atas air bah pantai.

src: In New York City, Department of Transportation employees worked a twelve-hour overtime shift to salt and plow the snow from streets and highways.
ref: Di kota New York, karyawan Departemen Transportasi bekerja lembur 12-jam secara bergantian mencairkan dan menumpuk salju dari jalanan dan jalan raya.

src: Alternate-side of the street parking regulations are suspended, but not the city's public schools, much to the chagrin of New York's children.
ref: Bergantian-sisi jalanan memarkir peraturan yang tergantung, tetapi tidak di sekolah umum kota, sangat kecewa pada anak-anak New York.

src: Although the streets are navigable, the Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) is a different story: Service between Jamaica and Penn Stations remains suspended, as is service along the Port Washington and Hempstead branches.
ref: Walaupun di jalanan dapat dilalui, Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) adalah cerita yang berbeda: Pelayanan antara Jamaica dan Stasiun Penn tetap ditutup, seperti halnya pelayanan sepanjang Pelabuhan Washington dan cabang-cabang Hempstead.

src: Additionally, all running branches are expected to be running with 30 minute delays.
ref: Selain itu, semua cabang berjalan sesuai yang diharapakan akan dijalankan dengan menunda 30 menit.

src: The MTA Subways will cross-honor LIRR tickets, so customers will be able to take the E train from Jamaica instead.
ref: Kereta bawah tanah MTA akan menyeberangi tiket LIRR, sehingga para pelanggan akan dapat mengambil kereta E dari Jamaika sebagai gantinya.

src: A collaboratively-developed operating system kernel known as GNU Hurd has been made bootable using the L4 microkernel, which provides room for significant speed improvements over an existing implementation using the Mach microkernel.
ref: Kernel sistem operasi yang dibangun secara kolaboratif yang dikenal dengan nama GNU Hurd telah dibuat bisa boot menggunakan mikrokernel L4, yang menyediakan ruang untuk perbaikan kecepatan secara signifikan di atas implementasi eksisting menggunakan mikrokernel Mach.

src: The newer architecture also has a more lively developer community.
ref: Arsitektur yang lebih baru juga memiliki pengembang yang lebih hidup.

src: Developer Marcus Brinkmann made the historic step and finished the process initialization code, which enabled him to execute the first software on Hurd-L4.
ref: Pengembang Marcus Brinkmann membuat langkah bersejarah dan menyelesaikan kode proses inisialiasi yang memungkinkan dia untuk mengeksekusi software pertama di atas Hurd-L4.

src: In a message to the L4 port of GNU Hurd mailing list, Brinkmann wrote, "We can now easily explore and develop the system in any way we want."
ref: Dalam pesan kepada milis port L4 dari GNU Hurd, Brinkmann menulis, "Kita sekarang dapat dengan mudah mengeklorasi dan mengembangkan sistem sesuai dengan keinginan kita.

src: "With my glibc port, I can already build simple applications, but most won't run because they need a filesystem or other gimmicks (like, uhm, fork and exec), and I only have stubs (dummy functions which always return an error) for that now," he added in a later posting.
ref: "Dengan port glibc saya, saya sudah dapat membangun aplikasi sederhana, namun sebagian besar belum bisa berjalan karena membutuhkan filesystem dan gimmik yang lain (like, uhm, fork dan exec), dan saya hanya memiliki beberapa stub (fungsi dummy yang selalu mengembalikan error) untuk saat ini, "dia menambahkan dalam postingnya kemudian.

src: Compared with Linux and BSD Unix's monolithic kernel architecture, a microkernel based operating system provides developers greater modularity and isolation from hardware, a big win with L4 already being available for a large number of hardware varieties.
ref: Dibandingkan dengan arsitektur kernel monolitik Linux dan BSD Unix, sebuah sistem operasi berbasis mikrokernel menyediakan developer modularitas yang baik dan isolasi dari hardware, kemenangan yang besar dengan L4 sudah tersedia untuk sejumlah besar hardware yang beragam.

src: There is a cost in speed for such abstraction, and this cost was higher on Mach, at around 15%, compared with only around 5% on L4 and it's predecessor L3, both developed by Dr. Jochen Liedtke.
ref: Ada biaya dalam kecepatan untuk abstraksi seperti itu, dan biaya ini lebih tinggi di Mach, sekitar 15%, dibandingkan dengan hanya sekitar 5% di L4 dan pendahulunya L3, keduanya dikembangkan oleh Dr Jochen Liedtke.

src: The greater modularity and abstraction of a microkernel approach means that the microkernel itself does not need constant modification as is seen in the Linux kernel today, since it provides only the very minimum of services, and does so very carefully.
ref: Modularitas dan abstraksi yang lebih besar dari pendekatan mikrokernel berarti mikrokernel itu sendiri tidak memerlukan modifikasi konstan sebagaimana terlihat pada kernel Linux hari ini, karena kernel hanya menyediakan layanan yang sangat minimun dan sangat hati-hati.

src: However, the Mach kernel first developed ten years earlier at Carnegie Mellon University is seen as a flawed first implementation, with the lessons learned being implemented in microkernels like L4, known as second-generation microkernels.
ref: Akan tetapi, kernel Mach yang pertama kali dikembangkan 10 tahun silam di Carnegie Mellon University dilihat sebagai implementasi perdana yang cacat, dengan hikmah diimplementasikan di mikrokernel seperti L4, yang dikenal sebagai mikrokernel generasi kedua.

src: The GNU Hurd forms the base of the GNU operating system, much of which has been widely adopted by users of other Unix-like operating systems, including Linux.
ref: GNU Hurd membentuk dasar sistem operasi GNU, sebagian besarnya telah diadop secara luas oleh pengguna sistem operasi seperti-Unix, termasuk Linux.

src: The GNU Project has been developing the Hurd since 1983.
ref: Proyek GNU telah mengembangkan Hurd sejak 1983.

src: In 1990, the GNU Project decided to use the Mach kernel, rather than writing their own.
ref: Pada tahun 1990, Proyek GNU memutuskan untuk menggunakan kernel Mach, dari pada menulis dari awal.

src: The Hurd is released as free software under the GNU General Public License (GPL).
ref: Hurd dirilis sebagai software bebas di bawah lisensi GNU General Publik License (GPL).

src: The Hurd kernel is an experiment which aims to surpass existing Unix kernels in functionality, security, and stability, while remaining largely compatible with them.
ref: Kernel Hurd adalah percobaan, yang bertujuan untuk mengungguli kernel Unix yang ada saat ini dalam fungsionalitas, keamanan, dan stabilitas, ketika sebagian besar sisanya kompatibel dengan mereka.

src: According to the GNU Hurd project, "The Hurd should, and probably will, be ported to other hardware architectures or other microkernels in the future" .
ref: Menurut Proyek GNU Hurd, "Hurd seharusnya dan mungkin akan diporting ke arsitektur hardware atau mikrokernel lainnya di masa datang."

src: A limited port of Linux already runs on L4, known as L4Linux.
ref: Port Linux terbatas sudah berjalan di L4, dikenal sebagai L4Linux.

src: In an appearance on the The Tonight Show with Jay Leno Thursday night, United States President Barack Obama told host, Jay Leno, that he had bowled at the White House bowling alley and scored a 129.
ref: Dalam penampilan pada The Tonight Show bersama Jay Leno Kamis malam, Presiden Amerika Serikat Barack Obama mengatakan kepada pembawa acara, Jay Leno, bahwa ia telah bermain bowling di gelanggang bowling Gedung Putih, dan memperoleh skor 129.

src: It was like the Special Olympics or something, the President said.
ref: Itu seperti Olimpiade Khusus atau yang setara, kata Presiden.

src: The Special Olympics is an international organization that promotes self-confidence and social skills for people with intellectual disabilities.
ref: Olimpiade Khusus adalah organisasi internasional yang mempromosikan kepercayaan-diri dan keterampilan sosial bagi orang dengan disabilitas intelektual.

src: It organizes the Special Olympics World Games which is recognized by the International Olympic Committee and is similar to the Paralympic Games which are for people with physical disabilities.
ref: Organisasi tersebut mengorganisasikan Kejuaraan Dunia Olimpiade Khusus yang diakui oleh Komite Olimpiade Internasional dan mirip dengan Kejuaraan Paralimpik yang diperuntukkan bagi orang dengan disbilitas fisik.

src: Even before the taped show was aired, Barack Obama called the chairman of the Special Olympics to apologize.
ref: Bahkan sebelum rekaman acara ditayangkan, barack Obama telah menghubungi ketua Olimpiade Khusus untuk meminta maaf.

src: He phoned Timothy Shriver from Air Force One on the way back to Washington, D.C..
ref: Dia menelpon Timothy Shriver dari Air Force One dalam perjalanan kembali ke Washington D. C.

src: Tim Shriver is also the son of Eunice Kennedy Shriver who founded the Special Olympics.
ref: Tim Shriver adalah juga anak dari Eunice Kennedy Shriver yang mendanai Olimpiade Khusus.

src: "He expressed his disappointment, and he apologized in a way that was very moving. "
ref: "Dia mengekspresikan penyesalannya, dan dia minta maaf dengan cara yang sangat mengharukan."

src: "He expressed that he did not intend to humiliate this population," Shriver said on Friday in an interview on Good Morning America.
ref: "Dia mengekspresikan bahwa dia tidak bermaksud untuk menghina populasi ini, " kata Shriver pada hari Jum'at dalam wawancara di Good Morning America.

src: "People with special needs are great athletes and productive citizens."
ref: "Orang dengan kebutuhan khusus adalah atlet hebat dan penduduk yang produktif."

src: "The President made an offhand remark making fun of his own bowling that was in no way intended to disparage the Special Olympics," White House deputy press secretary, Bill Burton, said.
ref: "Presiden membuat komentar spontan mengolok-olok kemampuan bowlingnya yang tidak dimaksudkan untuk merendahkan Olimpiade Khusus, " Deputi Sekretaris Pers Gedung Putih, Bill Burton, berkata.

src: "He thinks that the Special Olympics are a wonderful program that gives an opportunity to shine to people with disabilities from around the world."
ref: "Dia berfikir bahwa Olimpiade Khusus adalah program yang menakjubkan yang memberi kesempatan untuk bersinar kepada orang dengan disabilitas dari seluruh dunia."

src: Meanwhile, Kolan McConiughey, a top Special Olympics bowler told the Associated Press that he doesn't think Obama bowls like a Special Olympian.
ref: Sementara itu, Kolan McConiughey, pebowling top dari Olimpiade Khusus berkata kepada Associated Press bahwa ia tidak berfikir permainan bowling Obama seperti atlet Olimpiade Khusus.

src: McConiughey has five perfect 300 games on his track record as a bowler and averages a score of 212.
ref: McConiughey memiliki lima skor sempurna 300 di rekam jejaknya sebagai pebowling dan skor rata-ratanya 212.

src: "I'd tell him to get a new bowling ball, new shoes and bring him down to the lane," said McConiughey, offering bowling advice to the President.
ref: "Saya akan katakan kepadanya untuk membeli bola bowling yang baru, sepatu baru dan membawanya ke lane, " kata McConiughey, menawarkan saran bowling kepada Presiden.

src: "Keep his body straight, his arm straight and keep his steps straight".
ref: "Jaga badannya lurus, tangannya lurus dan menjaga langkahnya agar lurus."

src: Maria Shriver, sister of Tim Shriver, said "The President's comment hurts millions of people throughout the world."
ref: Maria Shriver, saudara dari Tim Shriver, berkata "Komentar Presiden melukai jutaan orang di seluruh dunia."

src: California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger, who is married to Maria Shriver, said, "He [Obama] loves Special Olympics, and he would do everything he can to help Special Olympics."
ref: Gubernur kalifornia Arnold Schwarzenegger, yang menikah dengan Maria Shriver, berkata, "Dia [Obama] mencintai Olimpiade Khusus, dan dia akan melakukan apa pun yang dapat dilakukan untuk membantu Olimpiade Khusus."

src: Press Secretary Robert Gibbs told reporters, "I know that the President believes that the Special Olympics are a triumph of the human spirit, and I think he understands that they deserve a lot better than — than the thoughtless joke that he made last night".
ref: Sekretaris Pers Robert Gibbs mengatakan kepada reporter, "Saya tahu bahwa Presiden percaya bahwa Olimpiade Khusus adalah kemenangan spirit manusia dan saya fikir dia mengerti bahwa mereka berhak mendapatkan jauh-jauh lebih banyak dari pada lelucon kurang bijaksana yang dia buat tadi malam."

src: Two rockets hit the south of Lebanon's capital Beirut today, injuring three or more people.
ref: 2 roket menghantam ibukota Lebanon selatan Beirut hari ini, melukai 3 atau lebih orang.

src: The rockets landed in a district controlled by the Hezbollah organisation, a Shi'a Islamic militant and political group, with one rocket hitting a car showroom, and the other a residential building.
ref: Roket mendarat di distrik yang dikuasai oleh Hizbullah, kelompok politik dan militan Syiah, dengan 1 roket menghantam showroom mobil dan roket lainnya bangunan rumah tinggal.

src: While it is unclear who fired the rockets, Lebanon's interior minister, Marwan Charbel, said it appeared the rockets had come from the south-east of the city.
ref: Tidak jelas siapa yang menembakkan roket, namun Menteri Dalam Negeri Lebanon, Marwan Charbel, mengatakan nampaknya roket datang dari tenggara kota.

src: The attacks come after Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah addressed his followers yesterday, committing the militant group to fighting in Syria's conflict.
ref: Serangan datang setelah pemimpin Hizbullah Hasan Nasrallah menyerukan pengikutnya kemarin, berjanji kelompok militan untuk berperang di konflik Siria.

src: Syrian rebels have threatened retaliation against the Hezbollah group for sending fighters to assist Syrian President Bashar al-Assad, who is fighting to end a revolt against his rule.
ref: Pejuang Suriah mengancam pembalasan terhadap kelompok Hizbullah karena mengirim pejuang untuk membantu presiden Suriah Bashar al-Assad, yang berperang untuk mengakhiri pemberontakan terhadap pemerintahannya.

src: The revolt started more than two years ago, and has killed 80,000 people, leaving 1.5 million refugees.
ref: Pemberontakan dimulai lebih dari dua tahun yang lalu dan telah menewaskan 80.000 orang, sebanyak 1,5 juta orang pengungsi.

src: Nasrallah's speech confirmed the group are directly involved in Syria's war, and pledged they would protect Lebanon's borders from the control of rebels.
ref: Pidato Nasrullah mengkonfirmasi kelompok itu secara langsung terlibat dalam perang Siria dan bersumpah mereka akan melindungi perbatasan Lebanon dari kontrol pemberontak.

src: He called sending troops outside Lebanon to protect the country "a completely new phase" for Hezbollah.
ref: Dia menyebut pengiriman tentara keluar Lebanon untuk melindungi negara "sebuah fase yang baru sama sekali" bagi Hizbullah.

src: In the Syrian border town of Qusayr, government and Hezbollah forces continue a seven-day battle to expel Syrian rebels from the town.
ref: Di kota perbatasan Siria, Qusary, tentara pemerintah dan Hizbullah melanjutkan perang tujuh-hari untuk mengusir pemberontak Siria dari kota.

src: Reportedly 40 or more people were killed there yesterday, including a number of Hezbollah fighters.
ref: Dilaporkan 40 atau lebih orang terbunuh di sana kemarin, termasuk sejumlah pejuang Hizbullah.

src: Nasrallah pledged Hezbollah will continue fighting until the conflict has been turned in President Assad's favour.
ref: Nasrullah bersumpah Hizbullah akan terus bertempur sampai konflik diubah menjadi keunggulan Presiden Assad.

src: A wildlife official in Zimbabwe said today that the amount of animal poaching in the country has increased substantially this year, blaming an international crime syndicate.
ref: Petugas Satwaliar di Zimbabwe mengatakan hari ini, bahwa jumlah perburuan binatang di negara ini telah meningkat pesat tahun ini, dan menyalahkan sindikat kejahatan internasional.

src: He said that 65 elephants and 30 rhinoceroses have been killed this year by poachers.
ref: Dia mengatakan 65 gajah dan 30 badak telah terbunuh tahun ini oleh pemburu.

src: "From January to October this year we have lost 65 elephants through poaching," said Vitalis Chadenga, the operations director of the Zimbabwe National Parks and Wildlife Authority.
ref: "Dari Januari sampai Oktober tahun ini kami kehilangan 65 gajah akibat perburuan, " kata Vitalis Chadenga, direktur operasi Taman Nasional Zimbabwe dan Otoritas Satwaliar.

src: "In the same period we have lost 24 black and six white rhinos. "
ref: "Pada periode yang sama kami kehilangan 24 badak hitam dan 6 badak putih."

src: "It is true that we have witnessed an escalation of poaching nationwide, particularly on private farms."
ref: "Benar kami telah menyaksikan peningkatan perburuan di seluruh negara, khususnya di peternakan privat."

src: "We do have a group of international gangsters, who are funding poachers around this part of the world and taking away many horns and it is a major problem," the director continued; "we have arrested 2,500 poachers in the same period, ten poachers have been shot dead since the beginning of this year."
ref: "Terdapat kelompok kriminal internasional, yang membiayai perburuan di sekitar bagian dunia ini dan mengambil banyak tanduk dan itu adalah masalah utama, " lanjut direktur; "kami telah menahan 2.500 pemburu pada periode yang sama, 10 pemburu telah tertembak mati sejak awal tahun ini."

src: Zimbabwe is one of four countries in Africa that are home to large numbers of rhinos, the others being Kenya, Namibia, and South Africa.
ref: Zimbabwe adalah 1 dari 4 negara di Afrika yang menjadi habitat sejumlah besar badak, negara lainnya adalah Kenya, Namibia dan Afrika Selatan.

src: About 100,000 elephants live in Zimbabwe, and Chandenga said that the numbers have been growing in past years.
ref: Sekitar 100.000 gajah hidup di Zimbabwe, dan Chandenga mengatakan jumlahnya meningkat di tahun lalu.

src: A tornado, spawned from a large storm, has hit the United States city of Atlanta, Georgia, causing extensive damage throughout the city.
ref: Sebuah tornado, berkembang dari badai besar telah menerjang kota Atlanta, Georgia, Amerika Serikat, menyebabkan kerusakan besar di sepanjang kota.

src: The National Weather Service confirmed Saturday morning that it was a tornado that struck the city.
ref: Layanan cuaca nasonal mengkonfirmasi hari Sabtu pagi bahwa tornado menyerang kota.

src: After reviewing the aftermath of the storm, they classified it as an EF2 tornado on the Enhanced Fujita scale.
ref: Setelah meninjau ulang kalkulasi setelah badai, mereka menggolongkan badai tersebut sebagai tornado EF2 dalam skala Fujita yang ditingkatkan.

src: Atlanta mayor Shirley Franklin says she is beginning to apply for federal disaster aid.
ref: Walikota Atlanta Shirley Franklin mengatakan dia mulai mendaftar ke bantuan federasi bencana alam.

src: There have been no confirmed deaths, but the mayor's spokeswoman says there may be dead victims trapped within the ruins of a collapsed loft complex.
ref: Belum ada kematian yang dikonfirmasi, namun juru bicara walikota mengatakan mungkin ada korban jiwa yang terperangkap di dalam reruntuhan dari komplek bangunan yang runtuh.

src: The Fulton Cotton Mill Lofts are located in the historic Cabbagetown neighborhood, where at least 20 homes were destroyed.
ref: Lot Fulton Catton Mill berlokasi di daerah bersejarah Cabbagetwon, tempat setidaknya 20 rumah telah hancur.

src: It looks like a bomb went off, it looks like World War III, said Mahsud Olufani, who has an art studio in the neighbourhood.
ref: Seperti ada bom yang meledak, seperti perang dunia ke III, ungkap Mahsud Olufani, yang memiliki studio seni di lingkungan tersebut.

src: At least 27 people suffered injuries, mostly cuts and bruises.
ref: Sedikitnya 27 orang menderita luka-luka, kebanyakan luka gores dan memar-memar.

src: Grady Memorial Hospital, where many of the injured were taken, had suffered some window damage but was still operating.
ref: Rumah Sakit Memorial Grady, tempat banyak merawat pasien luka mengalami kerusakan jendela namun masih bisa beroperasi.

src: Around 50 people have been taken to a local Red Cross shelter for displaced residents.
ref: Sebanyak 50 orang telah dibawa ke tempat perlindungan palang merah setempat karena tempat mereka yang hancur.

src: The tornado struck during the semifinal game of the SEC Basktetball Tournament between Mississippi State and Alabama.
ref: Tornado menerjang selama semifinal pertandingan dari turnamen bola basket SEC antara negara bagian Mississippi dan Alabama.

src: Play was stopped with around 2 minutes to go in overtime when heavy wind could be heard outside with rippling of the roof.
ref: Permainan terhenti selama 2 menit karena overtime saat angin kencang terdengar di luar dan merobek atap.

src: Damage was done to the roof as debris fell to the floor.
ref: Kerusakan terjadi di atap saat puing-puing jatuh dari atap.

src: "I thought it was a tornado or a terrorist attack," said Mississippi State guard Ben Hansbrough.
ref: "Saya pikir itu adalah tornado atau serangan teroris, " ungkap penjaga negara bagian mississippi Ben Hansbrough.

src: A tornado warning was issued for the downtown area a few minutes before the storm hit.
ref: Peringatan tornado dikeluarkan di area pusat kota beberapa menit sebelum badai menerjang.

src: "Ironically, the guy behind me got a phone call saying there was a tornado warning," said Lisa Lynn, who was attending the game at the Georgia Dome.
ref: "Ironisnya, pria di belakang saya mendapat telepon yang mengatakan ada peringatan tornado, "kata Lisa Lynn yang menghadiri pertandingan di Georgia dome.

src: And in two seconds, we heard the noise and things started to shake.
ref: Dan dalam dua detik, kami mendengar suara dan semuanya mulai bergoncang.

src: The CNN Center in downtown Atlanta was severely damaged, especially in the atrium, where the ravaged ceiling allowed water to pour in.
ref: Pusat CNN di pusat kota Atlanta rusak parah, khususnya di atrium tempat atap-atap rusak membuat air masuk ke dalam.

src: Police closed several streets near the CNN Center because of the debris, which included power lines, billboards, and even office chairs.
ref: Polisi menutup beberapa jalan dekat pusat CNN karena puing-puing, yang termasuk kabel listrik, papan iklan, dan bahkan kursi kantor.

src: The Omni Hotel, which is attached to the CNN Center, also sustained damage, with many of its windows shattered.
ref: Hotel Omni yang terhubung dengan pusat CNN juga mengalami kerusakan dengan banyak jendelanya yang pecah.

src: Visitors at the hotel were evacuated to the exhibition hall at street level.
ref: Tamu di hotel tersebut dievakuasi ke dalam ruang pameran di level jalan.

src: " There was a lot of windows breaking and stuff falling," said Terrence Evans, a valet at the hotel.
ref: "Ada banyak jendela pecah dan barang-barang berjatuhan, "ungkap Terrence Evans petugas valet di hotel.

src: At Centennial Olympic Park, located near CNN and the Omni Hotel, two Olympic torch sculptures had fallen over, and a performance pavilion was destroyed.
ref: Di Taman Olympic Centennial yang terletak di dekat CNN dan Hotel Omni, dua patung obor Olimpiade jatuh dan pavilion penyelengaraan juga hancur.

src: A high-rise dorm at Georgia State University was damaged by the tornado, as evidenced by a large hole in the building's 14th floor.
ref: Asrama bertingkat di universitas Georgia rusak karena tornado, sebagai buktinya sebuah lubang besar di lantai 14 bangunan.

src: According to Georgia Power, more than 13,000 of their customers are currently without electricity.
ref: Menurut Georgia Power, lebih dari 13,000 pelanggan mereka saat ini tanpa listrik.

src: Crews are working to fix downed power lines, but they said it would be difficult with all the debris.
ref: Para pekerja sedang bekerja memperbaiki jaringan listrik, namun mereka mengungkapkan akan kesulitan dikarenakan puing-puing.

src: Another large storm, currently in Mississippi, is heading towards Atlanta, and is forecast to arrive around 3 p.m.
ref: Badai besar lainnya saat ini di Mississippi sedang mengarah ke Atlanta dan diprediksi akan tiba pada pukul 3 sore.

src: National Weather Service meteorologist Mike Leary said Friday's storm could be "nothing to compare with what's coming in tomorrow".
ref: Pelayanan Cuaca Nasional Meteorologi Mike Leary mengatakan badai jumat "tidak bisa dibandingkan dengan apa yang akan datang besok."

src: All downtown events scheduled to occur Saturday have been cancelled.
ref: Semua acara yang dijadwalkan di pusat kota untuk hari minggu telah dibatalkan.

src: The remaining SEC tournament games are to be played at Georgia Tech's Alexander Memorial Coliseum, located in the undamaged midtown.
ref: Sisa turnamen pertandingan SEC akan dimainkan di Georgia Tech Coliseum Alexander Memorial yang terletak di tengah kota yang tidak rusak.

src: Four bombs blasted at popular seaside resorts in northern Spain on Sunday.
ref: 4 bom meledak di resort tepi laut yang terkenal di Spanyol bagian utara pada hari Minggu.

src: The blasts were preceded by the warning of the Basque separatist group ETA, which allowed the police to evacuate the nearby area.
ref: Ledakan-ledakan tersebut diawali dengan peringatan dari kelompok separatis Basque ETA, yang memungkinkan polisi untuk mengevakuasi area sekitar.

src: Previously, a first homemade bomb blasted in a bank in the Basque town of Getxo.
ref: Sebelumnya, sebuah bom buatan rumah meledak di sebuah bank di kota Basque di Getxo.

src: Five hours later, a warning call was received in the Basque fire service telling that four bombs were planted on the beaches of Laredo and Noja, in the northern Spanish province of Cantabria.
ref: 5 jam kemudian, sebuah telepon peringatan diterima di kantor pemadam kebakaran Basque yang memberitahu bahwa empat bom telah ditanam di beberapa pantai di Lareda dan Noja, di provinsi bagian utara Spanyol di Cantabria.

src: The four bombs exploded between 1100 (1000 GMT) and 1400.
ref: 4 bom tersebut meledak sekitar pukul 11.00 pagi (10.00 GMT) dan 14.00 sore.

src: There were no injuries because the police had evacuated the area.
ref: Tidak ada korban cedera karena pihak kepolisian telah melakukan evakuasi di area tersebut.

src: ETA has routinely targeted tourist destinations in northern Spain during summer months.
ref: ETA secara rutin menyasar tempat-tempat wisata di Spanyol bagian utara selama bulan-bulan musim panas.

src: Celia Franca, founder of the National Ballet of Canada and its training ground, the National Ballet School of Canada, died at age 85 Monday in Ottawa, Ontario.
ref: Celia Franca, pendiri National Ballet of Canada dan tempat pelatihannya, National Ballet School of Canada, meninggal pada usia 85 tahun di Ottawa, Ontario.

src: She is reported to have died in an Ottawa Hospital and her cause of death is not known.
ref: Dia dilaporkan telah meninggal di rumah sakit Ottawa dan penyebab kematiannya tidak diketahui.

src: She went to the hospital last week and stayed there until she had died.
ref: Dia berada di rumah sakit minggu kemarin dan berada di sana sampai dia meninggal.
